message:
chore(e2e): refresh tests/e2e_results.log with 2026-04-22 run on threadripperje

Replaces the stale 2026-02-02 SenseDemoBox baseline with a fresh
verbose-mode run on the current dev host (threadripperje) captured
today. The log is tracked in this repo as a canonical "last known good"
snapshot so CI and contributors have a reference for what a clean pass
looks like.

Run summary preserved in the log tail:
  Total Passed:  82
  Total Failed:  0
  Total Skipped: 0
  Overall Exit:  0

Behaviour of the test suite is unchanged — this is just a log refresh.
Content deltas vs the previous log are host/time/verbose-flag cosmetics
(timestamps, hostname, and the extra per-test detail `--verbose` emits);
no test assertions changed.
